description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This canvas belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length: FreesizeMade of canvas for durability and styleContrast stitch detailing for added attractionTang clasp to offer a snug Fit and hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitBroad base to sit snug on the waistBrand name embossed on the loop Brand logo embossed on the tailCareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
